title: Generating a Brief Resume Summary
scenario: Write a prompt that gets an LLM to generate a concise resume summary (around 50-70 words) for a fictional software engineer. The summary should highlight the candidate's technical skills, experience, and education. Use a formal tone and focus on achievements rather than responsibilities.

evaluationCriteria.description: Checks if the generated summary meets the word count and tone requirements.
Evaluates the relevance and accuracy of the technical skills, experience, and education mentioned in the summary.
Ensures the summary is written in a formal tone.
Verifies the summary is properly formatted and easy to read.
